title: PDF Viewer Gap slider fix
description:
The Gap slider (vertical spacing between stacked PDF pages in Viewer mode) no longer freezes mid-drag. Previously each tiny drag step triggered a full UI re-render, which destroyed the slider and broke pointer capture.

The fix updates page positions incrementally while dragging (rAF-throttled, light DOM sync only) and saves the full layout when you release the slider.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg57).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Fix PDF Viewer Gap slider freezing during drag.
Gap layout updates use incremental DOM sync instead of full render.
Full bounds sync and persist on slider release only.
